name: Airbus SE
lede: Airbus runs six centers across three Indian cities. New Delhi, Bengaluru and Vadodara, covering SSC, CoE, GCC/GIC and engineering & design, built over nineteen years.
insight: Search elsewhere and you will usually find one Airbus office in India. We map six, across three cities, each tagged by center type and function. Knowing the whole footprint is what turns a name on a list into an account you can plan against.
metaTitle: Airbus SE GCC in India: Centers, Footprint & Leaders | Bamboo Reports
metaDescription: Airbus runs 6 verified centers across 3 Indian cities (New Delhi, Bengaluru, Vadodara), covering SSC, CoE, GCC/GIC and engineering & design. See the full India footprint, org map and contacts on Bamboo Reports.

leaders.departments: Finance, IT, HR, GCC leadership and Procurement

titles.title: President and MD Airbus India and South Asia

about.description: Airbus's India footprint covers New Delhi, Bengaluru and Vadodara, spanning SSC, CoE, GCC/GIC and engineering & design. The centers deliver IT, R&D and ER&D, Procurement and Sales & Marketing for the group's global operations.

bandCopy: Exact center locations, per-center headcount, the technology stack and all 35 decision-makers, in one profile.

faq.q: How many centers does Airbus operate in India?
faq.a: Airbus operates 6 active centers in India.

faq.q: Which Indian cities does Airbus have centers in?
faq.a: Airbus's India footprint includes New Delhi and 2 additional cities.

faq.q: What types of centers does Airbus run in India?
faq.a: Airbus runs SSC and 3 additional center types in India.

faq.q: How many people work at Airbus's India centers?
faq.a: Aggregate and center-level headcount for Airbus's India operations is available in the full profile.

faq.q: Who leads Airbus's GCC in India?
faq.a: Bamboo Reports tracks leaders at Airbus's India centers, across Finance and other leadership functions. Names and contact details open with a free account.

sources: company filings, LinkedIn, NASSCOM and Bamboo Reports' primary research
